calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: KENNETH TSANG, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The court orders the case dismissed with prejudice pursuant plaintiff's request. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2025 Continued To Sep-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to September 09, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
